sourceRef: tip:Onboarding a new student veteran in under an hour

slides.headline: Accelerate student veteran enrollment in 60 minutes
slides.body: Streamline your intake process with our desktop tool.

slides.headline: Data Entry
slides.body: Automate student data collection with a single annual payment*.

slides.headline: Certification
slides.body: Automate certification processing with one click.

slides.headline: Compliance Tracking
slides.body: Stay on top of all student veteran compliance requirements.

slides.headline: Financial Aid
slides.body: Streamline GI Bill and Yellow Ribbon financial aid processing.

slides.headline: Reporting
slides.body: Generate detailed reports for easy review and compliance.

outline.caption: Accelerate student veteran enrollment in 60 minutes with our desktop tool. Track compliance, support student veterans, and streamline certification and financial aid processing. Learn more in our 60-minute onboarding guide. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
